title: Last Dry Tile
intendedTensionBeat: The main puppy appears one step from danger, but the correct rescue line is readable and satisfying.
intendedReleaseBeat: A dramatic last-dry-step extraction delivers a memorable water rescue without feeling unfair.
expectedPath: Follow the obvious urgent route, make one dock-safe stabilizer if needed, rescue just ahead of water, then finish the secondary puppy calmly.
expectedFailMode: Wrong play delays the hero rescue, but the level should mostly serve as recovery and spectacle after L38.
designNotes: Capture-friendly water moment. This should be the band's memorable emotional rescue beat.
